ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "cloud_coverage" REAL /* Cloud coverage as a percentage */,
  "bright_sunshine" REAL /* Bright sunshine duration in hours */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of the data quality */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., Barisal, Bangladesh) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Weather Station, Satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Ground, Airborne, Satellite) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source (if applicable) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., Manual, Automated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data collection method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the method was last updated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the data integration (e.g., Weather API) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being integrated */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the integration was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last successful synchronization */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of synchronization (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_max_temp" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "forecast_min_temp" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "forecast_rainfall" REAL /* Forecasted rainfall in millimeters */,
  "forecast_humidity" REAL /* Forecasted relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "forecast_wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed in meters per second */,
  "forecast_cloud_coverage" REAL /* Forecasted cloud coverage as a percentage */,
  "forecast_bright_sunshine" REAL /* Forecasted bright sunshine duration in hours */,
  "forecast_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecasting model used */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
